personality_one_liner: A high-performance, command-center interface for rapid AI script generation and TTS playback.

spacing.rule: Dense and tactical. Use dividers and tonal separation instead of shadows. Keep padding tight but readable.

do's: Use on the floating TTS Audio Player controls over the scrolling script
Use on sticky headers or bottom tabs if content scrolls underneath
dont's: Do not use on list rows or form inputs
Do not use if it compromises the clarity of text underneath

screens.name: Generator
screens.purpose: A command center to input links/text, trigger AI generation, and control the TTS playback.

states.loading: Full-screen dim overlay with an animated processing indicator, signaling AI analysis.
states.empty: Clean input module awaiting a link or text. Bottom sticky CTA is disabled.
states.error: Inline validation text under the input field in red, with a retry prompt.

screens.layout: Top: Simple header. Middle: A stacked module for TextInput (URL or raw text). When a script is generated, the input module shrinks or collapses, and a ScrollView of the script takes over the screen. Bottom: A sticky CTA 'Procesar y Leer'. When playing, this CTA swaps out for a floating, glassmorphic Audio Player control bar (Play, Pause, Stop, Progress).

screens.name: History
screens.purpose: A fast-scanning list of previously generated scripts for quick replay.

states.loading: Skeleton list items matching the height of a standard history card.
states.empty: A stylized empty state showing the microphone image with a call-to-action to generate the first script.
states.error: Centered error message indicating DB failure with a retry button.

screens.layout: A stacked list of cards on surfaceSecondary. Each card shows the truncated script text, date, and a prominent 'Play' button. Tapping a card opens a modal or navigates back to the Generator screen to play it. Tight spacing, using borders for separation instead of shadows.

instructions_to_main_agent: Adhere strictly to the '7 Dark-First Utility DARK' personality. Do not add heavy shadows; use borders and tonal differences for elevation.
Implement the 'Procesar y Leer' CTA as a sticky component above the safe area bottom.
The TTS audio controls MUST replace or overlay the primary CTA once a script is generated and playing. Use glassmorphism for this floating control bar so scrolling text is visible underneath.
When displaying text over images (e.g., hero backgrounds), ALWAYS use the mandatory vertical gradient-to-dark scrim (top -> bottom: transparent to ≥70% surfaceInverse).
No indigo, violet, blue, or purple colors. The accent color is Signal Red (brand). Use it sparingly for primary actions.
All app language and TTS configurations must be strictly in Spanish ('es' / 'es-ES' / 'es-MX').
Use SQLite or AsyncStorage to save generated scripts locally. Each history entry must store the text and date.
Web Search learnings: Modern AI content apps use minimalist, high-contrast layouts. The TTS player should feel like a native music player (clean controls, progress indication).
